tests.name: and_short_circuit_false
tests.description: AND short-circuits when left side is false
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context.a == true && context.b == true };

tests.name: or_short_circuit_true
tests.description: OR short-circuits when left side is true
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context.a == true || context.b == true };

tests.name: set_evaluation_in_when
tests.description: set literal evaluated in when clause
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { action in [Action::"GET", Action::"POST"] };

tests.name: set_evaluation_in_when_no_match
tests.description: set literal evaluated in when clause with no match
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { action in [Action::"PUT", Action::"DELETE"] };

tests.name: entity_equality_in_when
tests.description: entity == entity comparison in when clause
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal == User::"alice" };

tests.name: entity_equality_type_mismatch
tests.description: entity == entity with different types in when clause
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal == Admin::"alice" };

tests.name: entity_ne_in_when
tests.description: entity != entity comparison in when clause
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal != User::"bob" };

tests.name: not_with_non_boolean_denies
tests.description: negating a non-boolean expression produces error and denies

tests.name: integer_literal_in_condition
tests.description: integer literal compared with integer context

tests.name: type_mismatch_eq_denies
tests.description: comparing string with integer using == produces error and denies
